Bash(cd /d/study/vibe_coding && python3 << 'EOF'
import re

# Read data.js and analyze description lengths
with open\('data.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract all Korean descriptions
ko_descs = re.findall\(r'"ko":\\s*"\([^"]+\)"\(?=[,}]\)', content\)

# Calculate stats
desc_lengths = [len\(desc\) for desc in ko_descs if len\(desc\) > 50]
if desc_lengths:
    print\(f"Total descriptions with length > 50 chars: {len\(desc_lengths\)}"\)
    print\(f"Min length: {min\(desc_lengths\)}"\)
    print\(f"Max length: {max\(desc_lengths\)}"\)
    print\(f"Average length: {sum\(desc_lengths\) / len\(desc_lengths\):.0f}"\)
    print\("\\nLongest descriptions \(first 3\):"\)
    for i, desc in enumerate\(sorted\(ko_descs, key=len, reverse=True\)[:3]\):
        print\(f"{i+1}. {len\(desc\)} chars: {desc[:80]}..."\)
EOF)
